title: Vulnerability
html:
Stub. The minority register in Yahir's corpus — the inner-monologue voice that surfaces in letter to self entries, late-night todo lists, and rare scene-specific moments. Counter-balance to the dominant build-mode bravado.

Specimens

  • 2020 09 15 st vincent de paul yogurt — "maybe for once I am doing things right"
  • 2025 03 01 peacock bar incident
  • The 2025 "how I'm scraping by" inventory

Connections

  • · (its inverse register)
